name: Vanillas Kifli
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Butter; unsalted, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter with sugar in a large mixing bowl until combined. Add yolks and vanilla, then gradually add flour. Knead dough on a floured surface until well combined, forming a smooth ball. Cover and let rest at room temperature for 2 hours.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Roll out about 1 tablespoon of dough into a thin rectangle. Shape the dough into a rope that is about 3 inches long and 1/2 inch thick. Form the rope into a crescent shape. Repeat with remaining dough, spacing cookies about 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to wax paper.
3. While the cookies are still warm, roll each one in vanilla sugar. Cool completely before serving.
4. Melt chocolate in a double boiler over simmering water. Once melted, dip the tips of each cookie into the chocolate and set aside to cool on wax paper.
